abstract: Establishes a streaming connection at the provided endpoint.

declaration.code: @MainActor final func connect(endpoint: FoveatedStreamingSession.Endpoint = .systemDiscovered) async throws

overview:
## Discussion

You can establish a streaming connection in a variety of ways:

You can stop establishing a connection by cancelling the task or calling [doc://com.apple.FoveatedStreaming/documentation/FoveatedStreaming/FoveatedStreamingSession/disconnect()].
title: connect(endpoint:)
